caption: A person wearing a grey baseball cap is seen in a small video call window at the top center of a computer screen. The main area of the display shows a dark interface containing a complex network diagram with circular nodes connected by lines. A white rectangular pop-up window is open over the diagram, featuring a blue flowchart with several rectangular blocks connected by arrows. Various browser tabs are open at the top of the screen, including titles such as "Trial & Learning by Systemdynamics", "Futures of Society by Systemdynamics", "Insights Introduction to Systems", and "Rural Community Food System". A sidebar on the right side of the interface lists a name, "David Bedding". The scene remains static across the sequence, with the person in the video call, the network diagram, and the flowchart window remaining in the same positions.
